children.text: The Friendly family song
children.cn: 友好的家庭之歌

children.text: Friendly, Friendly, We're the Friendly family,
children.cn: 友好，友好， 我们是友好的家庭，

children.text: Cameron, Jim and Jenny, Cameron's one of the family,
children.cn: 卡梅伦，吉姆和珍妮， 卡梅伦是家庭的一员，

children.text: Friendly, We're the Friendly family. Miaow!
children.cn: 友好，我们是友好的家庭。喵！

children.text: Cameron's Search
children.cn: 卡梅伦的寻找

children.text: New Node
Cameron: Hmm. Where's that bird? Is it on the table? Miaow! No, it isn't.
children.cn: 卡梅伦：嗯。那只鸟在哪里？它在桌子上吗？喵！不，它不在。
children.statement: 这句话询问的是鸟的位置。
children.explanation: Where's that bird? 是在询问位置。

children.text: Cameron: Hmm. Where's that bird? Is it under the chair? Miaow! No, it isn't.
children.cn: 卡梅伦：嗯。那只鸟在哪里？它在椅子下面吗？喵！不，它不在。

children.text: Cameron: Hmm. Where's that bird? Is it in the cupboard? Miaow! No, it isn't.
children.cn: 卡梅伦：嗯。那只鸟在哪里？它在橱柜里吗？喵！不，它不在。

children.text: New Node
Cameron: Miaow! I'm on my boat, with my fish. One, two, three, four. Four fish!
children.cn: 卡梅伦：喵！我在我的船上，和我的鱼在一起。一，二，三，四。四条鱼！

children.text: New Node
Frida: Caw!
children.cn: 弗里达：嘎！

children.text: Cameron: It's the bird! No! They're my fish. They're my fish!
children.cn: 卡梅伦：是那只鸟！不！它们是我的鱼。它们是我的鱼！

children.text: Frida: Caw! Here... a fish for you. I'm Frida.
children.cn: 弗里达：嘎！给……一条鱼给你。我是弗里达。

children.text: Cameron: Ooh, five fish... and a new friend. Miaow! Thanks, Frida!
children.cn: 卡梅伦：哦，五条鱼……还有一个新朋友。喵！谢谢，弗里达！

children.text: Teacher: Shh, children! Please copy. Draw and write.
children.cn: 老师：嘘，孩子们！请抄写。画画并写字。

children.text: Annie: Look, Tom. It's a yellow bird.
children.cn: 安妮：看，汤姆。是一只黄色的鸟。

children.text: Tom: Oh, yes! It's in the window!
children.cn: 汤姆：哦，是的！它在窗户里！

children.text: Tom: Look, Annie. It's Hugo, the school cat!
children.cn: 汤姆：看，安妮。是雨果，学校的猫！

children.text: Annie: Oh, yes! Hello, Hugo. Where's the bird?
children.cn: 安妮：哦，是的！你好，雨果。鸟在哪里？

children.text: Tom: It's on the teacher's bag.
children.cn: 汤姆：它在老师的包上。

children.text: Tom: Look at Hugo.
children.cn: 汤姆：看雨果。

children.text: Tom: Oh, no!
children.cn: 汤姆：哦，不！

children.text: Annie: Now the bag's on the floor. And the bird's on the crayon box.
children.cn: 安妮：现在包在地上。鸟在蜡笔盒上。

children.text: Tom: Oh, no! Oops!
children.cn: 汤姆：哦，不！哎呀！

children.text: Tom: Now the crayons are on the floor. And the bird's on the cupboard.
children.cn: 汤姆：现在蜡笔在地上。鸟在橱柜上。

children.text: Annie: Oh, no! Hugo's on the cupboard too. Where's the bird now?
children.cn: 安妮：哦，不！雨果也在橱柜上。鸟现在在哪里？

children.text: Tom: It's in the window again. Look!
children.cn: 汤姆：它又在窗户里了。看！

children.text: Teacher: OK...
children.cn: 老师：好的……

children.text: Teacher: Oh, no! My bag, the crayons, the toys! Hugo, you bad cat! I'm angry!
children.cn: 老师：哦，不！我的包，蜡笔，玩具！雨果，你这只坏猫！我很生气！
